title: redirect action absent, undocumented
description: RFC 5228 defines four core actions: keep, fileinto, discard, redirect. This crate implements keep/fileinto/discard but silently swallows 'redirect' as an unknown command (eval_stmt catch-all). There is no SieveAction::Redirect variant and no compile-time error for 'redirect "user@example.com";'. Callers building a Sieve-compliant MTA will file bugs when redirect silently does nothing. Either add the variant and require the block, or document the omission prominently in crate-level docs and add a compile-time error for redirect usage.
